memoryArtifacts.description:
Stradling Family Pedigree (page 2) from STRADLING CORRESPONDENCE: A SERIES OF LETTERS WRITTEN IN THE
REIGN OF QUEEN ELIZABETH; WITH NOTICES OF THE FAMILY OF STRADLING OF ST. DONAt's CASTLE, CO. GLAMORGAN. Edited by THE REV. JOHN MONTGOMERY TRAHERNE.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Stradling於大約1375年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根聖 堂納次時，他的父親Edward Stradling58歲，母親Gwenlian Berkerolles55歲。他與Isabel St Barbe結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1412年之前在威爾士格拉莫爾根聖 堂納次。

nameMeanings.name: Stradling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Strättlingen near Thun in Switzerland. The English landed family bearing this name, with a seat at Saint Donats (Glamorgan), traces its origins to John de Estratlinges (died c. 1293), who came to England from Switzerland with Otto de Grandison, Edward I's companion-in-arms.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Stradling was born about 1375, in St Donats, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Stradling, was 58 and his mother, Gwenlian Berkerolles, was 55. He married Isabel St Barbe. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1412, in St Donats, Glamorgan, Wales.

Il a épousé Isabel St Barbe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1412, à St Donats, Glamorgan, Galles.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Stradling(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스트 도냇스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Stradling(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenlian Berkerolles(은)는 55세였다. 그는 Isabel St Barbe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1412년 이전 웨일스 글램르건 스트 도냇스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Stradling родился около 1375 г. в местности ст донац, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Stradling было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenlian Berkerolles, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel St Barbe. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 1412 г. в местности ст донац, глэморган, Уэльс.
